Name: Unemployment initiative program
Text: assign unemployed workers to one of your non-operational companies

Name: Nationalization
Text: remove a non-operational public company and replace it with a non-operational CC company of your choose without Mechinary objects, you may assign workers to it.

Name: Emergancy state
Text: if there are at laest 3 policies with proposed bids, choose a policy without a proposed bill and move its marker 1 step

Name: Pressing matters
Text: propose a bill.  You may call for immediate vote for free.

Name: Radical reforms
Text: propose a bill.  You can move the marker 2 steps but can't call for immediate election.

Name: A metter of high priority
Text: look at the top 2 event cards and if able place one on the board. Then preform an event action

Name: Immediate response
Text: choose an event and preform its action twice

Name: Shift focus
Text: look at the top 2 event cards.  One of them can replace 1 of the events on the board. Then preform an event action

Name: Agenda-Setting
Text: get 1 personal Influance for each policy that matches your current political agenda

Name: Allowances and subsies
Text: provide 20V to a class. Get a +1 legitimacy for that class.

Name: Business grants
Text: provide 5V to the CC for each of its companies. Get 1 legitimacy for each 3 CC companies

Name: Employment support scheme
Text: provide 15V to the WC and MC

Name: Healthcare program
Text: provide Health to a class equal to its population.  Get +1 legitimacy for that class

Name: Literacy program
Text: provide Edu to a class equal to its pop. Get 1 legitimacy for that class

Name: Step for representation
Text: provide 1 personal influance and 2 voting cubes to WC/MC/CC. Get +2 legitimacy from that class.

Name: Supplemental income program
Text: provide 1V to a class for each of its employed workers. For every 10V you provide get +1 legitimacy to that class

Name: Construction boom
Text: State, WC and CC get 15V each

Name: Denail of free speech
Text: get 2 influaces.  Choose up to 2 players: each give you 1 fluance and you loss -1 legitimacy

Name: Foreign financial assistance
Text: get 10V for each policy that matches your current political agenda

Name: Foreign investment program
Text: spend 2 influances to get 40V

Name: Geopolitical support
Text: get money based on the current Foreign trade policy (6): A:15,B:30,C:45

Name: Quantitative easing
Text: Get 25V.  If you have a loan get 35V insteaed.

Name: higher VAT
Text: each player pay15V to the State.  -1 Legitimacy for 2 classes.

Name: Growth in tourism
Text: the State, MC, CC get 15V each

Name: Public sector overtime
Text: choose one of your companies. Pay the workers wages and perform a production for that company

Name: Foreign students
Text: sell up to 8 Edu to the foreign market at the current local price

Name: Medical tourism
Text: sell up to 8 Med to the foreign market at the current local price

Name: Privatization
Text: sell operational company to CC for its cost
